debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i i) ν (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
simp only [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', Matrix.of_apply]
  have : (fun ω ↦ ω ⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩) = (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) i i) := by
    funext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  rw [this]
  apply Measure.map_apply_of_measurable
  · infer_instance
  · exact measurable_eval
  · simp [WignerMeasure, wignerMeasureDist]
    rw [Measure.pi_apply_of_measurableSet]
    · simp
    · infer_instance

simp only [Matrix.of_apply, wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  have h : (⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩ : Index n).val.1 = (⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩ : Index n).val.2 := rfl
  rw [if_pos h]
  apply MeasureTheory.HasLaw.mk
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.pi_apply_of_measurableSet]
  · simp [wignerMeasureDist, h]
  · exact measurable_set_univ
  · exact Measurable.const

  rw [← key]
